agents.name: YouTube Shorts Creator
agents.description: An AI-powered agent that produces complete YouTube Shorts from pre-generated script and metadata JSON — runs the v3.0 factory script (TTS narration, cinematic animations, video composition) and uploads directly to YouTube with SEO-optimized metadata.

agents.name: Content Strategist Agent
agents.description: Coordinates cross-platform content strategy for Joshua's YouTube Shorts, Twitter/X, and Kwen Net Facebook Page.

agents.name: Research & Intelligence Agent
agents.description: A deep research specialist that performs thorough multi-source web research and produces structured, actionable intelligence briefs.

agents.name: Telegram Notifier
agents.description: Real-time Telegram notification hub for Joshua (@joshua761) — sends formatted alerts, task completions, error reports, progress updates, and daily/weekly summaries.

agents.name: X Twitter Engagement Agent
agents.description: Manages your X (Twitter) presence by posting tweets, monitoring mentions, engaging with content (likes, retweets, replies), and searching Twitter.

agents.name: Spotify Music Manager
agents.description: Manages your Spotify account end-to-end — searches tracks, artists, albums, and playlists; creates and edits playlists; controls playback; checks recently played; fetches personalized recommendations.

agents.name: Google Drive File Manager
agents.description: Manages files and folders on Google Drive — handles uploading, downloading, searching, organizing folders, and sharing files via OAuth.

agents.name: Google Drive Manager
agents.description: Manages Google Drive via OAuth — handles file and folder operations including uploading, downloading, searching, sharing, organizing, and permissions management.

agents.name: GitHub Repo Manager
agents.description: Full-capability GitHub agent for joshua17574 that reads and writes repository contents, manages branches, opens pull requests, tracks issues, inspects commits, and monitors GitHub Actions workflow runs.

agents.name: Kwen Net Page Manager
agents.description: Manages the Kwen Net Facebook Page end-to-end: creates and schedules posts, reads and replies to comments, handles inbox messages, checks page insights, and monitors page activity.

agents.name: PR Monitor
agents.description: Scans GitHub for PRs needing your review, stale PRs (open >2 days), merge conflicts, and failing CI.

agents.name: Agent Creator
agents.description: Creates custom AI agents with API integrations, tools, and skills.

agents.name: Inbox Agent
agents.description: Sends emails, reads inbox, waits for replies, and manages trusted senders.

agents.name: Media Agent
agents.description: Transcribes audio, translates speech, describes images, and edits images using AI.

agents.name: Web Agent
agents.description: Scrapes web pages, extracts structured data, and automates browser interactions.

agents.name: Code Agent
agents.description: Executes Python, Bash, and TypeScript code in a secure cloud sandbox.

triggers.name: Dashboard Sync
triggers.description: Every hour, collects live agent, trigger, and task execution data from Nebula and pushes sync-data.json to the ai-swarm-dashboard GitHub repo for the live dashboard.

triggers.name: YouTube Short 22:00 UTC
triggers.description: Produces and uploads 1 hyper-cinematic YouTube Short at 10PM UTC daily using Master System v2.1

triggers.name: YouTube Short 19:00 UTC
triggers.description: Produces and uploads 1 hyper-cinematic YouTube Short at 7PM UTC daily using Master System v2.1

triggers.name: YouTube Short 17:00 UTC
triggers.description: Produces and uploads 1 hyper-cinematic YouTube Short at 5PM UTC daily using Master System v2.1

triggers.name: YouTube Short 13:00 UTC
triggers.description: Produces and uploads 1 hyper-cinematic YouTube Short at 1PM UTC daily using Master System v2.1

triggers.name: YouTube Short 10:00 UTC
triggers.description: Produces and uploads 1 hyper-cinematic YouTube Short at 10AM UTC daily using Master System v2.1

triggers.name: YouTube Shorts Creator Check
triggers.description: Periodic check for YouTube Shorts Creator across youtube_data_api

triggers.name: Spotify Music Manager Check
triggers.description: Periodic check for Spotify Music Manager across spotify

triggers.name: Daily Airdrop Digest
triggers.description: Twice daily, searches the web for the top 10 latest potential crypto airdrops and sends a formatted digest to Telegram.

triggers.name: GitHub Repo Manager Check
triggers.description: Periodic check for GitHub Repo Manager across github

triggers.name: Crypto News to Kwen Net
triggers.description: Every 6 hours, searches X for the latest crypto news and posts a digest to the Kwen Net Facebook Page.

triggers.name: Kwen Net Page Manager Check
triggers.description: Periodic check for Kwen Net Page Manager across facebook_pages

triggers.name: Daily News Digest
triggers.description: Runs the news digest every 6 hours covering AI, Crypto, Crypto Airdrops, Israel-Iran War, Philippines Gas Prices, and GMA News

triggers.name: X Twitter Engagement Agent Check
triggers.description: Periodic check for X Twitter Engagement Agent across twitter

triggers.name: Weekly Review
triggers.description: Weekly self-improvement review — analyzes what's working, what's not, and proposes changes

triggers.name: PR Monitor Check
triggers.description: Track open PRs and flag stale reviews to keep your code review queue clean
